text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
вҖ”DoriyaaaaaaaaпҪһпҪһпҪһпҪһпјҒпјҒпјҒпјҒ 
The princess is coming throughпҪһпҪһпҪһпҪһпјҒпјҒпјҒпјҒ

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I did itпҪһпҪһпҪһпҪһ! I did it again today, with grace, elegance, 
and bravery! It's a great victory!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Of course! It's becauseвҖ”!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: вҖҰвҖҰMy, my destiny! My future prince is with me!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
When two people connect with each other, a miracle always 
happens! That's the power of the "bond"!!
choice_data_list: Wow, that's a lot of confidenceвҖҰвҖҰ
Wow, that's a lot of confidenceвҖҰвҖҰ

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I'm sure of it! This is what I learnedвҖҰвҖҰ 
from Princess Fighter!
вҖҰвҖҰIt's good to be confident. It'd be best if she keeps it upвҖ”

вҖ”Hmph. Finally found you. It's you, isn't it? 
The self-proclaimed princess, the common girl 
who's been on a roll latelyвҖҰ

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
!? It's not "self-proclaimed"!! 
Who are you!?

text_block_list.name: Trainee with Ringlets
text_block_list.text:
FuвҖҰ Couldn't you tell just by looking at the princess aura 
that's surrounding me? I am the real princess! The most 
powerful princess at a hundred billion princess levels!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
PffffftпҪһ What's a hundred billion princess level! 
I'm a princess as well! A princess who found her princeвҖҰвҖҰ!

text_block_list.name: Trainee with Ringlets
text_block_list.text: вҖҰвҖҰPrince? Don't tell me you mean the trainer here?

text_block_list.name: Trainee with Ringlets
text_block_list.text:
вҖҰвҖҰ AпҪһhahaha! That plain look didn't make me notice it at all! 
Like a little minced meat mixed with cheap carrot croquettes!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
TвҖҰ that's not true! My trainer is, let's seeвҖҰвҖҰ 
wagyu beef steak, sprinkled with caviarвҖ”
choice_data_list: Can we not talk about foodвҖҰ

text_block_list.name: Trainee with Ringlets
text_block_list.text:
HmphвҖҰ If you're so pissed, try shutting me up with a race. 
I'll have you personally shredded by a true princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Bring it on! I gonna beat you up so bad, you're gonna 
take back what you said!

That Uma Musume looks familiar. She's a powerhouse who's 
made a name in the Twinkle SeriesвҖҰвҖҰ!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! I'm not going to let that mean person beat me. 
I will beat her until she goes home crying!
choice_data_list: At least think of a strategyвҖҰвҖҰ!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Geez, don't worry about me! 
We don't need a strategy! BecauseвҖҰ

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You and I have the power of our invincible "bond"! 
Please believe in me and wait for me hereпҪһ!

вҖҰI should've stopped her. Kawakami Princess ran away 
with confidenceвҖҰ

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
YesпҪһ! I'm on a good paceпҪһ! 
I'm going to take the lead with this speedпҪһ!

Kawakami Princess is running fast as ever, butвҖҰ. 
the Ringlet Hair Uma Musume was chasing her from behind.

text_block_list.name: Trainee with Ringlets
text_block_list.text:
HmphвҖҰвҖҰ You said your name was Kawakami right? 
What do you think it means to be a princess?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: !? It's obvious! A princess is a gorgeous, graceful, braveвҖҰ

text_block_list.name: Trainee with Ringlets
text_block_list.text:
вҖҰFufufu, Fuhahahahaha! That's so funny! 
Hey you, listen carefully!

text_block_list.name: Trainee with Ringlets
text_block_list.text:
вҖ”Being a princess means to possess a power that suppresses 
anyone below her! That's what a real princess is!!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hey пҪһпҪһпҪһпҪһ!

text_block_list.name: Trainee with Ringlets
text_block_list.text: Ah-hahahahahaвҖ”вҖ”I'll take the lead here!

Kawakami Princess tried hard to catch up to her, 
but in the end she lost by three horse lengthsвҖҰ

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: HaвҖҰ haвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰ ugh, why пҪһвҖҰвҖҰ!

text_block_list.name: Trainee with Ringlets
text_block_list.text: Ah-hahahaha! Aargh cough cough, ehem! This is the difference between aвҖҰвҖҰ true princess and a fake oneвҖҰвҖҰ!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
вҖ”UwaaaaaaaaaпҪһпҪһпҪһпҪһ! ! 
It's so frustratingпҪһпҪһпҪһпҪһпјҒпјҒпјҒпјҒ
Kawakami Princess screamed and ran away.
